name: End of Realm Legends
publisher: 北京炳飞网络科技有限公司
short_description: This is your story—a tale of refusing to be ordinary, constantly challenging yourself, rewriting your destiny, and forging your own legend...
detailed_description:
This is "my" story...
And the answers "I" seek...
Reborn and unwilling to lead an ordinary life, "I" embarked on a journey...
Meet companions, explore and adventure, defend and lay siege to cities, become a lord, and continually raise your noble status...
Silvermoon Harbor, Rhode Town, the fortress city of Kluborg...
Ahead lie even more prosperous cities, and the stories "I" experience will become ever more thrilling...
How many unknown secrets lie hidden in this world?
To what heights can "I" ultimately rise?
The journey continues, and the answers will ultimately be determined by "me"...

Game Features:

  • A classic turn-based role-playing game!

  • 68 joinable companions, each with their own unique characteristics!

  • Over 500 types of enemies across seven major regions, and a massive city siege strategy system!

  • 14 weapon types, each with its own distinctive skill system!

  • A unique Fighting Spirit (Dou Qi) weapon-binding system!

  • A vast magic system and a unique amplification system!

  • 4 major starting origins, each offering a completely new gameplay experience!

  • Each region features rich and distinctive side quests and exploration gameplay!

  • Light novel-level character side stories provide an immersive fantasy adventure experience
